title: bulbostylis maritima
intro: Bulbostylis maritima is a type of aquatic plant also known as the sea club-rush, belonging to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are also used in herbal preparations.
